description: You are the student webmaster for a middle school astronomy club. The club's recent astrophotos are underexposed and too large for the school blog. Write and execute a Bash script at /home/ga/Documents/enhance_astrophotos.sh that uses ImageMagick to batch-process the .jpg files in /home/ga/Documents/raw_astro/. The script must apply exposure enhancement, resize each image so that neither dimension exceeds 800 pixels, and save the results to /home/ga/Documents/enhanced_astro/ using their original filenames.
